title: Great sound, but the battery lets it down
review_body: The audio quality on these earbuds genuinely surprised me for the price, deep bass and clear highs. Problem is the battery barely lasts three hours before I'm reaching for the case again. Fine for a commute, frustrating for a long flight.

title: Broke after two weeks, very disappointed
review_body: Used this blender maybe five times and the motor started smelling like burning plastic, then it just stopped. For something in this price range I expected it to last more than a fortnight. Reached out to support and I'm still waiting. Would not buy again.
